## Short-term goals (this quarter)

- Ship Persona v0.1.0 and submit NLnet application
- Get 5 external contributors or early adopters giving feedback
- Land one new consulting engagement for Q3

## Medium-term goals (this year)

- Persona reaches 500 GitHub stars and has an active contributor community
- Establish a sustainable open source funding model (NLnet + GitHub Sponsors)
- Write and publish three long-form technical essays on AI identity and
  sovereignty

## Long-term vision

A world where individuals own and control their identity context across AI
tools, just as they own their data. Persona becomes a recognised part of
the MCP ecosystem and inspires similar sovereign infrastructure projects.

## What success looks like

In three years: Persona is widely used, well-maintained by a community
beyond me, and has influenced how MCP clients and servers think about
user identity. My consulting practice has evolved to focus on AI
infrastructure design and governance.
